title: cleistanthus schlechteri var. pubescens
intro: Cleistanthus schlechteri var. pubescens, also known as the pubescent cleistanthus, is a plant species that belongs to the family Phyllanthaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antipyretic effects. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. Cleistanthus schlechteri var. pubescens can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, making it a versatile herb for traditional medicine.
